user.title: Connect Audiobookshelf
user.description: Enter an Audiobookshelf URL and API token. The token needs access to the library items you want to send.

mail.title: Configure Send to Kindle email
mail.description: Amazon must allow the sender address in the Kindle Personal Document settings.

abort.already_configured: This Audiobookshelf account is already configured.

init.title: Audiobookshelf options
init.description: Keep automatic sending disabled until you have tested the manual send service.

data.auto_send: Send matching webhook items to Kindle automatically

send_item.name: Send item
send_item.description: Send an Audiobookshelf library item to the configured Kindle address.

force.name: Force
force.description: Send even if the item was already marked as sent.

reset_sent_item.name: Reset sent item
reset_sent_item.description: Remove the sent marker for an Audiobookshelf item.

auth_failed.title: Audiobookshelf authentication failed
auth_failed.description: Audiobookshelf rejected the configured API token: {detail}. Reconfigure the integration with a valid token.

connectivity_failed.title: Audiobookshelf is not reachable
connectivity_failed.description: Home Assistant could not connect to Audiobookshelf: {detail}.

send_failed.title: Kindle send failed
send_failed.description: Audiobookshelf could not send the book to Kindle: {detail}.

missing_ebook.title: Audiobookshelf item has no ebook
missing_ebook.description: The triggered Audiobookshelf item does not contain an ebook file: {detail}.

unsupported_format.title: Ebook format is not enabled
unsupported_format.description: The ebook format is not enabled for sending: {detail}.

size_limit.title: Ebook exceeds attachment size limit
size_limit.description: The ebook is larger than the configured maximum attachment size: {detail}.
